name: Uncle Clay's House of Pure Aloha
tagline: All-natural syrups and real fruit — this is shave ice elevated to an art form.
mustOrder: lilikoi cream — tangy and rich, their signature
strawberry lemonade with li hing mui powder on top
haupia with azuki beans on the bottom
parking: Small lot in Aina Haina Shopping Center — easy parking
talkStory: Uncle Clay's is the real deal — all syrups are made in-house from real fruit, no artificial colors or flavors. They've won every shave ice award the islands have. The shop is in a humble strip mall in Aina Haina, which keeps it mostly locals. Ask for the 'Pure Aloha' combo if you can't decide — they'll set you up right. Clayton and his family run the place with genuine aloha spirit.
